sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No.138 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case 27.02.2026 Mr. Jam Zeeshan Ali, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota Advocate for the Respondent Pursuant to order dated 06.02.2026, learned counsel for respondent submits that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned order and remand the matter to the learned Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Reference application is disposed of. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
